h1.visual_description: Large, medium-weight sans-serif font, left-aligned with significant leading space.

visual_matchers.pattern: Small centered dot bullets followed by indented body text.
Complex diagram featuring colored elliptical nodes (grey, blue, green, red, teal, purple) with all-caps labels and interconnecting arrows with colored text labels.

markdown_grammar.citation_format: In-text narrative (no formal citations visible on this page)

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Bottom-aligned footer containing a page number followed by a vertical pipe and the document/section title (e.g., '10 | The Scholarly Publishing Ecosystem').
